key.name: first-run
key.description: Whether this is the first time the application is being run

key.name: simplified-mode
key.description: Show simplified interface for basic users

key.name: default-editor
key.description: Default text editor for editing files

key.name: max-recent-directories
key.description: Maximum number of recent directories to remember

key.name: upstream-check-frequency
key.description: How often to check for upstream updates (in hours)

key.name: ignore-prereleases
key.description: Whether to ignore prerelease versions when checking updates

key.name: ignored-upstream-versions
key.description: List of package:version pairs to ignore for upstream updates

key.name: show-trust-icons
key.description: Whether to show trust level icons for AUR packages

key.name: min-votes-medium-trust
key.description: Minimum number of votes required for medium trust level

key.name: min-votes-high-trust
key.description: Minimum number of votes required for high trust level

key.name: block-unvoted-packages
key.description: Whether to block installation of packages with no votes

key.name: show-realtime-terminal
key.description: Whether to show real-time terminal output during operations

key.name: check-devel-updates
key.description: Whether to check for updates of development packages

key.name: install-debug-packages
key.description: Whether to automatically install debug symbol packages

key.name: show-detailed-warnings
key.description: Whether to show detailed security analysis warnings
